title: NotifyMe
description: Get a notification sound when somebody types your name in chat!
body:
# Notify Me
Get a notification sound when somebody types your name in chat!

### How To Use
- Install dependencies
- Download the mod
- Put them into the mods folder
- Done

### Commands
- /notifyme : activate/deactive the mod.

### Links
- Want a new feature? open a issue at [Github](https://github.com/ahdplayer/NotfiyMe-Fabric/issues)
- Wanna ask stuff or talk? [Join My Community!](https://discord.gg/yccknYqnrn)
- Please report all the bugs you have found to [here](https://github.com/ahdplayer/NotfiyMe-Fabric/issues)
